title: Condensed Milk Melkkos
excerpt: Ingredients 1 small tin condensed milk 500 ml hot water 1 litre full cream milk 250 ml cake flour 125 ml soft butter pinch of salt If you like it very sweet you can stir in 125 ml sugar Method Heat the condensed milk, hot water and full cream milk in a pot on the stove. It must not begin …
html:
Ingredients
1 small tin condensed milk
500 ml hot water
1 litre full cream milk
250 ml cake flour
125 ml soft butter
pinch of salt
If you like it very sweet you can stir in 125 ml sugar
Method
  1. Heat the condensed milk, hot water and full cream milk in a pot on the stove. It must not start to boil.
  2. Put the cake flour and salt in a bowl and stir together.
  3. Rub the butter in with your fingers until it takes on the texture of sand.
  4. Add the flour mixture to the hot milk on the stove and stir continuously with a balloon whisk or wooden spoon.
  5. If it's not sweet enough to taste, add a little more sugar.
  6. Let it simmer for 15 minutes while stirring continuously.

Enjoy the melkkos with cinnamon sugar. (125 ml sugar + 5 ml ground cinnamon)
